title: Ouzi and Broccoli Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful Thai-inspired stir fry made with ouzi, broccoli, and crunchy sprouts, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of sesame oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the ouzi and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the broccoli and crunchy sprouts, and cook until the vegetables are tender-crisp, about 4-5 minutes.
Stir in the remaining 1 tablespoon of sesame oil and cook for an additional minute.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve immediately and garnish with additional crunchy sprouts if desired.
